verses.text: Ama hun sungin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar hong kuanto a, Jehoiakim kum thum sung ama nasem a suak hi. Tua ciangin Jehoiakim in amah lehdo hi
Tua ciangin ama nasem kamsangte tungtawnin a gen Topa’ thugenna bangin Judah a susia dingin ama langkhatah Topa in Khaldea mihonte, Syria mihonte, Moab mihonte, le Ammon mihonte a sawl hi

Ama gamtatnasate khempeuh tawh kizui-in Manasseh’ khialhna hangin ama muhna panin amaute a khinkhiatna ding, le a diakdiakin, amah in khialhna nei lo mite a thahna hangin Topa’ thupiakna tawh Judah tungah hih thu a hong tung taktak ahi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a mawh lo mite’ sisan tawh Jerusalem kidimsak a, Topa in ama mawhna maisak lo hi
Tu-in Jehoiakim’ sepna a omlaite, le a hih khempeuh, Judah Kumpite’ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Jehoiakim si a, ama tangin a tapa Jehoiakhin in a uk hi
Tua ciangin Babylon kumpipa in Egypt lui panin Eufratis gun dong Egypt kumpipa’ neih khempeuh laksak khin ahih manin Egypt kumpipa a gam panin hong kuankhia kikzo nawn lo hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jehoiakhin le a Uliante Galmatin Babylon-ah Kila

verses.text: Jehoiakhin kumpi a suahin kum sawm le giat pha a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kha thum sung uk hi. Ama nu’ min Nehushta hi a, Jerusalem khuami Elnathan’ tanu ahi hi
A pa’ gamtatnasa khempeuh bangin Topa’ muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi
Tua hun laitakin Jerusalem-ah Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar hong kuanto a, tua khuapi a umcih hi
Ama nasemte in a umcih laitakin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar tua khuapi-ah hong tung hi

Tua ciangin Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin in Babylon kumpipa tungah amah a kipan, ama nu, a nasemte, a uliante, le a kumpi inn-a zaneite a kipia hi. Topa in a genkholhsa bangin Babylon kumpipa in ama uk a kum giatna kumin thongkia-in amah la a, Topa’ biakinn-a van manpha khempeuh puakhia-in, Kumpi Solomon in a bawlsa, Topa’ biakinn sunga kham nazat khempeuh a satnen hi

Amah in Jerusalem mi khempeuh, a ulian khempeuh, le a thahat a vanglian khempeuh, galmatin tul sawm, le khutsiamte le sikseekte khempeuh a ciahpih hi. Tua gam a a zawngpente simloh kuamah dang om nawn lo hi
Amah in Babylon-ah Jehoiakhin a ciahpih hi. Kumpipa’ nu, kumpipa’ zite, ama nuai-ah a zaneite, le tua gam sung ukpite, Jerusalem panin Babylon-ah galmatin a la hi
Babylon kumpipa in a thahat, galdo dingin a hoih mi thahat khempeuh a vekpi-in tulsagih, le khutsiamte le sikseekte tulkhat, galmatin Babylon-ah a paipih hi
Tua ciangin Babylon kumpipa in Jehoiakhin’ tangin ama pa’ sanggampa Mattaniah kumpi-in koih a, ama min Zedekiah-in a kheelsak hi.
Zedekiah kumpi a suahin kum sawmnih le khat pha a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kum sawm le khat sung a uk hi. Ama nu’ min Hamutal hi a, Libnah khuami Jeremiah’ tanu ahi hi
Jehoiakim’ gamtatnasa khempeuh bangin Topa’ muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ hehna hangin ama kiang panin amaute a paihkhiatna zah dong dingin Jerusalem le Judah tungah thu hong om hi.
